'''Bon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] who studied with the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Bon was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] Bon remained at the [[Jedi academy|academy]] and continued to study under the [[Jedi instructor|instructors]] that remained.<ref name="CW9" />

After three years of fighting, the war came to a sudden end when the Republic's [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] betrayed the Order by issuing [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], an order which commanded the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] to execute their Jedi leaders. Able to escape into the shadows when the clones attacked, Bon and several of his peers, including Initiate [[Nia]], were rescued by a junk salvager named [[Hurd Coyle]]. Aboard his [[Hurd Coyle's ship|salvage ship]], the Initiates remained together as Coyle promised to take them to a safe location.<ref name="CW9" />

During their travel, Coyle's ship picked up a damaged [[V-19 Torrent starfighter/Legends|''V-19 Torrent'']] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], hoping to salvage some of the ships parts. Coyle was surprised to learn that [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone pilot]] [[HOB-147]] was still alive. When the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] woke up and started to destroy Coyle's reprogrammed [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s Coyle shot the clone with an [[electro-dart]] and locked the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in a room. When the clone escaped he found the Jedi Initiates hiding in the junk ship's hold. Thinking that the clone was going to kill him and his peers, Bon and the other Initiates knocked the man unconscious. When he awoke, the clone was convinced by Initiate Nia to spare her peers' lives. Later, when Coyle's ship was boarded by a group of clone troopers led by an [[Unidentified ARC trooper commander|ARC trooper commander]] of the newly christened [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], who were looking for escaped Jedi, clone HOB-147 lied to the commander and said there weren't any Jedi aboard the ship, allowing Bon and his fellow Jedi to escape.<ref name="CW9" />
